body_txt: Physical intimacy is a basic human desire. Humans generally want some degree of physical contact. Then there are those who like it a little too much. These people are the type who like hugging and cuddling people, often delivering The Glomp . Combine a Cuddle Bug with a character who Hates Being Touched , and more often than not, Hilarity Ensues . A Clingy Child might be one if the cause of their clinginess is displaying affection to older parental figures. Their skinship reaction is usually triggered by Moe and Cuteness Overload . When taken to the extreme, it might result in the person declaring I'm Taking Her Home with Me! . They may also present as Clingy Sleepers . For when the cuddling is done by a person who Does Not Know His Own Strength , see And Call Him "George" . A character who is a Cuddle Bug and also has Cumbersome Claws can also cause trouble. Compare No Sense of Personal Space .
